steps.title: Determine the meaning of "supported" from context
steps.content: The phrase "supported by massive sandstone pillars" describes a physical relationship: the pillars hold the bridge in place from below. The target meaning is structural, not emotional or abstract.

steps.title: Eliminate each wrong choice and confirm the correct one
steps.content:
• Choice A — Cherished: Cherished describes an emotional attitude, not a physical relationship between pillars and a bridge. ✗
  • Choice B — Defended: Defended implies protection against attack, which does not fit a structural description of a bridge. ✗
  • Choice C — Held up: Pillars literally hold up the structure above them—this matches the physical, structural meaning in context. ✓
  • Choice D — Improved on: Improved on means made better or surpassed; pillars do not improve on a bridge, they support it. ✗
That confirms C is correct.
